name: Zane Interactive Publishing Inc.
summary: Zane Interactive Publishing Inc. operates as an educational software publishers servicing the K-12 education market in the United States. It publishes approximately 260 curriculum-based educational software titles on CD-ROM delivering a library of curriculum-based teaching and testing content for 11 subjects. The company's electronic learning combined visual, audio, and text components enabling it to accommodate main preferred learning styles. It is also involved in education research, consultancy, partnerships, and designing concepts and services to enhance education. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Dallas, Texas.
